content: TASK-028 interrupt done: visible zone areas now collapse on click and collapsed representative nodes expand on click; the visible abstraction slider was removed from playground/viewer controls while the compatibility API remains. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work unless the human chooses to extend the same visible click surface to an explicit subgraph display mode or polish collapse summaries. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
